caption: The video shows a close-up of a tablet screen displaying a data acquisition interface with multiple channels, each represented by a different color and line style. The interface indicates that it is acquiring data for 5 out of 200 samples over a period of 20 seconds. Each channel has an associated toggle switch, which can be turned on or off. The switches for Channels 1 through 22 are shown, with some toggles already activated. The background includes a blurred view of a person's hand and part of a checkered shirt, suggesting that someone is operating the device. The scene appears to be set in a laboratory or technical environment, given the nature of the data acquisition process being displayed.
